moonlit_cliffside.name: Moonlit Cliffside Vigil
moonlit_cliffside.role_title: solitary samurai keeping a moonlit vigil
moonlit_cliffside.wardrobe: worn battle kimono layered under a dark haori, one shoulder partially exposed, a katana sheathed at the hip
moonlit_cliffside.pose_action: standing at the very edge of a cliff, one foot on a jutting rock, robes billowing in the wind, gazing silently into the vast mist below
props: sheathed katana resting against the hip
loose strands of hair caught in the wind
moonlit_cliffside.environment: on a rugged cliffside overlooking a vast misty valley, ancient pine trees clinging to the rock face below, a full moon cutting through drifting clouds
moonlit_cliffside.lighting: Cold silver moonlight from above, deep shadows on the cliff face, a faint blue mist rising from the valley below.
moonlit_cliffside.mood: solitary, windswept, quietly powerful, and poetic
